mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_property_meta (connection_id, label_kind, schema_name, label_name, property_name, display_name, is_searchable, is_list_display, remark) VALUES (#{connectionId}, #{labelKind}, #{schemaName}, #{labelName}, #{propertyName}, #{displayName}, #{isSearchable}, #{isListDisplay}, #{remark}) ON CONFLICT (connection_id, label_kind, schema_name, label_name, property_name) DO UPDATE SET display_name = EXCLUDED.display_name, is_searchable = EXCLUDED.is_searchable, is_list_display = EXCLUDED.is_list_display, remark = EXCLUDED.remark, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
